notable_phrases: We have moved from talking about AI to applying AI at scale
record quarter driven by the continued strength of Microsoft Cloud
margin improvement is pretty shocking to most considering the investments
summary: Microsoft delivered a record quarter with strong cloud and AI momentum, demonstrating significant margin expansion despite heavy AI infrastructure investments while analysts probed gently on Azure AI composition and capacity constraints.
change_summary: No material changes detected vs 2024 Q1; scores broadly stable QoQ.
